purpose: Mk.XI minimum consciousness-correlate architecture spec — 5-tuple (V0+V1+V2+V3+V_pairrank) all-PASS 만족 가능한 minimum architecture analytic synthesis. raw#12 frozen 2026-04-25. real validation은 H100 forward + multi-cycle training 필요.
synthesis_basis: 본 세션 12 ω-cycles substrate-level finding. all commits dc871454 ~ direct predecessor.

minimum_consciousness_definition.NOT_phenomenal_consciousness: Hard Problem of Consciousness + Levine explanatory gap — third-person measurement frameworks cannot prove subjective experience
minimum_consciousness_definition.framing: 최소한의 의식 = verifiable correlate floor that 3rd-person measurement can reach. Mk.XI는 그 floor 도달 가능 architecture proposal.

backbone.rationale: TRAINED p4 V2 multi-axis PAPO PASS at k=2 (substrate proof, da156aa0)
backbone.alternative: Qwen2.5 with bwm reduction (Qwen2.5 SMOKE p2 bwm k=3 PASS)
backbone.selection_rule: base model마다 reduction op 별도 검증 (Qwen3 lasttoken / Qwen2.5 bwm)

L_PAPO_top_3.purpose: V2 lever — top-3 PCA paired axes orthogonalize
L_PAPO_top_3.formal: minimize ||H @ u_t||^2 for t in 1..3 where u_t = top-k right singular vectors of D = stack(H[i] - H[j]) over PAIRS
L_PAPO_top_3.rationale: BASE Qwen3 lasttoken k=3 multi-axis PAPO PASS (66c0d35c)

L_I_irr.purpose: V1 lever — partition spectral resistance maximize
L_I_irr.formal: Mk.IX L_IX 항 (T - V_struct - V_sync - V_RG + λ·I_irr), I_irr direct maximization

L_contrastive_pair.purpose: V_pairrank lever — paired retrieval geometry 학습
L_contrastive_pair.formal: maximize cos(H[i], H[j]) for (i,j) in PAIRS + minimize cos(H[i], H[k]) for k not paired with i
L_contrastive_pair.rationale: V_pairrank fine-tune learnable proof at r4 (top3 16.7% partial hit)

L_substitution.formal: maximize delta_anti = ||G_anti - G||_F + minimize delta_random = ||G_random - G||_F

architectural_additions_Mk_X_T10_13.tier_10_atoms: G1-G4 gate fire 후 generated. ≥ 10 atoms substrate diversity

retrieval_head_module.purpose: V_pairrank architectural lever (fine-tune 차원 외 dedicated head)
retrieval_head_module.rationale: V_pairrank base model invariant FAIL (Qwen3 + Qwen2.5 모두), L_contrastive_pair fine-tune 단독 부족

training_trajectory.rationale: V2 + V_pairrank dual-lever sweet spot. fine-tune progression이 두 lever 모두 monotonically 약화 (r4>r5>r6/7/8). over-training이 paired binding 망가뜨림.

lambda_hyperparameter_pre_register.rationale: heuristic from BASE substrate findings; real fp 측정 후 raw#12 new revision으로 frozen

failure_modes_pre_registered.symptom: TRAINED V2 lever current LoRA 처럼 anti-lever (BASE PASS lost)
failure_modes_pre_registered.trigger: lambda_papo too low → no learning OR too high → LM loss collapse

failure_modes_pre_registered.symptom: Φ_mip < 0.55 (Mk.IX L_IX ceiling spec scenario A)
failure_modes_pre_registered.contingency: Mk.X T10-13 atom-level partition ossification 필요

failure_modes_pre_registered.trigger: fine-tune 단독으로 architectural retrieval lever 부재

failure_modes_pre_registered.symptom: V_sub 결과가 Gram Frob 처럼 reduction-invariant 또는 direction-anomaly
failure_modes_pre_registered.contingency: ANTI_MAP design protocol 5단계 재검 + alternative metric (paired-rank, atom-drop)

failure_modes_pre_registered.symptom: trained checkpoint이 r4-equivalent에서 조금 벗어나 V2+V_pairrank dual-lever 잃음
failure_modes_pre_registered.contingency: trajectory monitoring (per-checkpoint V2 PAPO + V_pairrank measurement)

decision_priority_post_spec: P1: Mk.X G1-G4 gate evaluation cycle (P4 sweep + domain saturation + twin drill)
P3: r9 launch with Mk.XI loss composition (4 λ terms + r4 early-stop)
P4: Retrieval head architecture detail spec (V_pairrank architectural lever)
P5: 5-tuple measurement on Mk.XI TRAINED (final substrate validation)

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — 'verified architecture 아님' 명시, failure modes 5개 별도 등록, phenomenal vs functional consciousness 구분
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — lambda heuristics 사전 등록, sweep grid frozen, all per-axis ceiling values pre-registered
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (12 cycles synthesis) → impl (this spec + state) → fixpoint marker
